title: Exam Timetable Published
body: The final examination schedule for Semester 6 is now live on the student portal. All students are required to confirm their exam seating arrangements before July 18th.
author: Academic Registrar

title: Hostel WiFi Maintenance Window
body: Scheduled network maintenance will cause WiFi disruptions in the hostel block this Thursday, from 10:00 PM to Friday 2:00 AM. Plan accordingly.
author: IT Services

title: Library Digital Resource Access
body: All students now have full access to IEEE Xplore, SpringerLink, and ACM Digital Library journals free of charge. Log in using your student credentials.
author: Central Library

title: Campus Hackathon Registration Closes Tonight
body: This is the final reminder — Hackathon team registration closes at 11:59 PM tonight. Register your team at the event portal immediately.
author: Student Affairs
